cases.question: A1000型でE-42が発生した場合の一次対応は何ですか？
evidence: E-42 indicates cooling fan obstruction. Stop the A1000, inspect the fan guard, remove debris, then restart after temperature returns below 60C.

cases.question: E-42をいつエスカレーションしますか？
evidence: Escalate E-42 when it repeats twice within 24 hours or when temperature remains above 60C after inspection.
